'''''AZ 556''''' was a [[Modular conveyor]] docked with the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Azzameen Station/Legends|Azzameen Home Base]] during the [[Azzameen family]] raid on the [[Viraxo Industries]] [[Cargo Facility 1|base]] [[Viraxo 54]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
